uplink.description: Davis weather block (0B 20 00): barometric pressure 1013.21 hPa (29.92 inHg), air temp 23.89 C (75.0 F), 55% RH, wind 4.47 m/s @ 180 deg, rain rate 1.0 mm/h, day rain 2.4 mm, UV 3, solar 600 W/m2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds Davis weather frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js parseWeather over the same bytes (pressure 1013.21, temp 23.89, wind 4.47/180, humidity 55, rainRate 1, dayRain 2.4, uv 3, solar 600, dayET 1.27) and mapping to vocabulary units.

uplink.description: Combined T/RH/P + PM block (0B 30 00): temp 23.45 C, 55% RH, 1013.25 hPa, PM1 10 / PM2.5 25 / PM10 40 ug/m3, battery 95%, ts 2026-06-15T09:00:00Z
uplink._note: Synthetic combined frame; air values derived from reference/upstream-codec.js parseTERPM (temp 23.45, humidity 55, pressure 1013.25, pm 10/25/40, battery 95%). time is the RFC3339 UTC rendering of the same packed timestamp the upstream parseDate decodes.

uplink.description: Particulate-matter block (0B 20 01): PM1 10 / PM2.5 25 / PM10 40 ug/m3, ts 2026-06-15T12:30:00Z
uplink._note: Synthetic PM frame; PM values derived from reference/upstream-codec.js parsePM (pm1 10, pm25 25, pm10 40). time is the RFC3339 UTC rendering of the upstream packed timestamp.
Synthetic error case; upstream returns {errors:['Error on decoding payload']} for an unrecognized uplink id. Our codec reports the specific id.
